title: Theme: Travel and Airport
description: Useful vocabulary and phrases for traveling by plane.

sentences.spanish: ¿A qué hora sale el próximo vuelo para Madrid?
sentences.english: What time does the next flight to Madrid leave?

sentences.spanish: Tengo que facturar la maleta antes de ir a la puerta de embarque.
sentences.english: I have to check my suitcase before going to the boarding gate.

sentences.spanish: ¿Me puede poner un asiento de pasillo, por favor?
sentences.english: Can you assign me an aisle seat, please?

sentences.spanish: El vuelo lleva dos horas de retraso por el mal tiempo.
sentences.english: The flight is two hours delayed because of the bad weather.

sentences.spanish: Por favor, enseñe el pasaporte y la tarjeta de embarque.
sentences.english: Please show your passport and boarding pass.
Where can I pick up my luggage?

sentences.spanish: Hay mucha cola en el control de seguridad esta mañana.
sentences.english: There is a long queue at security this morning.

sentences.spanish: ¿Tiene algo que declarar en la aduana?
sentences.english: Do you have anything to declare at customs?

sentences.spanish: El avión está a punto de aterrizar en Madrid.
sentences.english: The plane is about to land in Madrid.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero viajar en clase business para tener más espacio.
sentences.english: I prefer to travel in business class to have more space.
